languages.original_text: {n}Turning to Nuncius, Eogunn raises his eyebrows.{/n} "Really? My dearest colleague states that Magos Haneumann and I once passed each other in Service Conduit 91-R. The esteemed Magos chided me for some minor neglect in the presentation of my augments, after which, having each voiced our opinions, we parted ways. It seems I considered this event to be inconsequential, and it has escaped my memory."

languages.text: {n}Обернувшись к Нунциусу, Эоганн приподнимает брови.{/n} "Неужели? Мой дражайший коллега утверждает, что однажды мы с магосом Ханейманном миновали друг друга в служебной перемычке 91-Р. Почтенный магос пожурил меня за какую-то незначительную халатность в облике моих аугментов, после чего, обменявшись мнениями, мы разошлись. Видимо, я счел это событие малозначимым, и оно ускользнуло из моей памяти".

{n}Turning to Nuncius, Eogunn raises his eyebrows.{/n} "Really? My dearest colleague states that Magos Haneumann and I once passed each other in Service Conduit 91-R. The esteemed Magos chided me for some minor neglect in the presentation of my augments, after which, having each voiced our opinions, we parted ways. It seems I considered this event to be inconsequential, and it has escaped my memory."

The esteemed Magos chided me for some minor neglect in the presentation of my augments, after which, having each voiced our opinions, we parted ways. It seems I considered this event to be inconsequential, and it has escaped my memory."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn alza las cejas y se gira hacia Nuncius.{/n} «¿De verdad? Mi querido colega afirma que el magos Haneumann y yo nos cruzamos una vez en el conducto de servicio 91-R. El estimado magos me criticó por una negligencia menor en la presentación de mis aumentos, tras lo cual compartimos nuestras opiniones y nos separamos. Parece que encontré inconsecuente el evento, porque ha escapado de mi memoria».
languages.original_text: {n}Turning to Nuncius, Eogunn raises his eyebrows.{/n} "Really? My dearest colleague states that Magos Haneumann and I once passed each other in Service Conduit 91-R. The esteemed Magos chided me for some minor neglect in the presentation of my augments, after which, having each voiced our opinions, we parted ways. It seems I considered this event to be inconsequential, and it has escaped my memory."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn alza las cejas y se gira hacia Nuncius.{/n} «¿De verdad? Mi querido colega afirma que el magos Haneumann y yo nos cruzamos una vez en el conducto de servicio 91-R. El estimado magos me criticó por una negligencia menor en la presentación de mis aumentos, tras lo cual compartimos nuestras opiniones y nos separamos. Parece que encontré inconsecuente el evento, porque ha escapado de mi memoria».

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡转向努恩修斯，挑了挑眉。{/n}“真的吗？我最亲爱的同僚说，我和哈努曼贤者曾经在服务通道91-R里擦肩而过。因我在展示植入物时有些小疏忽，那位可敬的贤者训斥了我几句，然后我们各自发表了意见，便分道扬镳了。看来，由于我认为这事无关紧要，它便从我的记忆中溜走了。”
languages.original_text: {n}Turning to Nuncius, Eogunn raises his eyebrows.{/n} "Really? My dearest colleague states that Magos Haneumann and I once passed each other in Service Conduit 91-R. The esteemed Magos chided me for some minor neglect in the presentation of my augments, after which, having each voiced our opinions, we parted ways. It seems I considered this event to be inconsequential, and it has escaped my memory."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡转向努恩修斯，挑了挑眉。{/n}“真的吗？我最亲爱的同僚说，我和哈努曼贤者曾经在服务通道91-R里擦肩而过。因我在展示植入物时有些小疏忽，那位可敬的贤者训斥了我几句，然后我们各自发表了意见，便分道扬镳了。看来，由于我认为这事无关紧要，它便从我的记忆中溜走了。”

languages.text: {n}Se tournant vers Nuncius, Eogunn hausse les sourcils.{/n} « Vraiment ? Selon mon cher collègue, le magos Haneumann et moi-même nous sommes croisés une fois, dans le conduit de service 91-R. L'honorable magos m'a reproché une négligence mineure dans la présentation de mes augmentations, après quoi, ayant chacun exprimé notre avis, nous avons repris nos routes respectives. Il semblerait que l'événement m'ait semblé trop insignifiant pour que je le garde en mémoire. »
languages.original_text: {n}Turning to Nuncius, Eogunn raises his eyebrows.{/n} "Really? My dearest colleague states that Magos Haneumann and I once passed each other in Service Conduit 91-R. The esteemed Magos chided me for some minor neglect in the presentation of my augments, after which, having each voiced our opinions, we parted ways. It seems I considered this event to be inconsequential, and it has escaped my memory."

traits.locale_text: {n}Se tournant vers Nuncius, Eogunn hausse les sourcils.{/n} « Vraiment ? Selon mon cher collègue, le magos Haneumann et moi-même nous sommes croisés une fois, dans le conduit de service 91-R. L'honorable magos m'a reproché une négligence mineure dans la présentation de mes augmentations, après quoi, ayant chacun exprimé notre avis, nous avons repris nos routes respectives. Il semblerait que l'événement m'ait semblé trop insignifiant pour que je le garde en mémoire. »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn dreht sich zu Nuncius um und hebt seine Augenbrauen.{/n} "Wirklich? Mein geschätzter Kollege sagt, dass ich Magos Haneumann seinerzeit in Wartungsleitung 91-R begegnet bin. Der geschätzte Magos hat mich für ein geringfügiges Versäumnis bei der Präsentation meiner Augmentationen gerügt, und nach einem kurzen Meinungsaustausch trennten sich unsere Wege wieder. Offenbar habe ich dieses Ereignis für irrelevant erachtet und es ist meinem Gedächtnis entfleucht."
languages.original_text: {n}Turning to Nuncius, Eogunn raises his eyebrows.{/n} "Really? My dearest colleague states that Magos Haneumann and I once passed each other in Service Conduit 91-R. The esteemed Magos chided me for some minor neglect in the presentation of my augments, after which, having each voiced our opinions, we parted ways. It seems I considered this event to be inconsequential, and it has escaped my memory."

Mein geschätzter Kollege sagt, dass ich Magos Haneumann seinerzeit in Wartungsleitung 91-R begegnet bin. Der geschätzte Magos hat mich für ein geringfügiges Versäumnis bei der Präsentation meiner Augmentationen gerügt, und nach einem kurzen Meinungsaustausch trennten sich unsere Wege wieder. Offenbar habe ich dieses Ereignis für irrelevant erachtet und es ist meinem Gedächtnis entfleucht."

languages.text: {n}ヌンキウスに向き直ると、エオガンは眉をひそめた。{/n}「本当ですか？私の親愛なる同僚によると、マゴス・ハネウマンと私はサービス・コンジット91-Rですれ違ったことがあるそうだ。尊敬するマゴスは、私のオーグメントの見せ方が少しおろそかだったことを咎めた。私はその出来事を、取るに足らないこととして記憶から消してしまったようだ。」
languages.original_text: {n}Turning to Nuncius, Eogunn raises his eyebrows.{/n} "Really? My dearest colleague states that Magos Haneumann and I once passed each other in Service Conduit 91-R. The esteemed Magos chided me for some minor neglect in the presentation of my augments, after which, having each voiced our opinions, we parted ways. It seems I considered this event to be inconsequential, and it has escaped my memory."

traits.locale_text: {n}ヌンキウスに向き直ると、エオガンは眉をひそめた。{/n}「本当ですか？私の親愛なる同僚によると、マゴス・ハネウマンと私はサービス・コンジット91-Rですれ違ったことがあるそうだ。尊敬するマゴスは、私のオーグメントの見せ方が少しおろそかだったことを咎めた。私はその出来事を、取るに足らないこととして記憶から消してしまったようだ。」

languages.text: {n}Nuncius'a dönen Eogunn, kaşlarını kaldırıyor.{/n} "Gerçekten mi? Pek değerli meslektaşım, Magos Haneumann bir zamanlar Hizmet Borusu 91-R'de yan yana bulunduğumuzu belirtiyor. Saygıdeğer Magos, ogmentasyonlarımın sunumundaki küçük bir ihmal nedeniyle beni azarlamış, sonrasında her birimiz fikrimizi dile getirdikten sonra yollarımızı ayırmışız. Anlaşılan bu olayı önemsiz bulmuş ve hafızamdan silmişim."
languages.original_text: {n}Turning to Nuncius, Eogunn raises his eyebrows.{/n} "Really? My dearest colleague states that Magos Haneumann and I once passed each other in Service Conduit 91-R. The esteemed Magos chided me for some minor neglect in the presentation of my augments, after which, having each voiced our opinions, we parted ways. It seems I considered this event to be inconsequential, and it has escaped my memory."
